headline: Welltower’s UK Senior Care Deals Reshape Growth And Risk Profile
summary: Welltower, NYSE:WELL, has expanded in the United Kingdom through large acquisitions of senior care property portfolios operated by Barchester and HC-One Group. These deals increase the company’s exposure to UK senior housing at a time of limited new supply in healthcare real estate. The transactions represent a material step in Welltower’s international growth plans focused on aging population trends. Welltower enters this expansion phase with its shares at $210.52 and a 1 year return of...
